title: Section 38J
content: 1[38J. Prohibition of teasing, etc., in a zoo.-- No person shall tease, molest, injure or feed any animal or cause disturbance to the animals by noise or otherwise, or litter the grounds in a zoo.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 16 of 2003, s. 24, for section 38-I (w.e.f. 1-4-2003).
